top3.sql:
SELECT 
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_pit_stop_duration
FROM 
    pitStops ps
JOIN 
    drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY 
    avg_pit_stop_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_pit_stop_duration
FROM 
    pitStops ps
JOIN 
    drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
HAVING 
    COUNT(ps.duration) > 0
ORDER BY 
    avg_pit_stop_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_pit_stop_duration
FROM 
    pitStops ps
JOIN 
    drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY 
    avg_pit_stop_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    AVG(CAST(ps.duration AS REAL)) AS avg_pit_stop_duration
FROM 
    drivers d
INNER JOIN 
    pitStops ps ON d.driverId = ps.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob >= '1980-01-01' 
    AND d.dob <= '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
HAVING 
    COUNT(ps.duration) >= 1
ORDER BY 
    avg_pit_stop_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_pit_stop_duration
FROM 
    pitStops ps
JOIN 
    drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
HAVING 
    COUNT(ps.duration) > 0
ORDER BY 
    avg_pit_stop_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_pit_stop_duration
FROM 
    pitStops ps
JOIN 
    drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY 
    avg_pit_stop_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    AVG(CAST(ps.duration AS REAL)) AS avg_pit_stop_duration
FROM 
    drivers d
INNER JOIN 
    pitStops ps ON d.driverId = ps.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob >= '1980-01-01' 
    AND d.dob <= '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
HAVING 
    COUNT(ps.duration) >= 1
ORDER BY 
    avg_pit_stop_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitStops p ON d.driverId = p.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' 
  AND strftime('%Y', d.dob) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1985'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY AVG(p.duration) ASC
LIMIT 3;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_pit_stop_duration
FROM 
    pitStops ps
JOIN 
    drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY 
    avg_pit_stop_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;
